results.title: Silver Rebounds to ₹285/g on May 21 After Recent Pullback: Check Latest City-Wise Rates
Ghana’s economic activity strengthens, but business confidence eases to 12.6% – BoG
results.description: Economic activity in Ghana recorded a strong improvement in the first quarter of 2026, with the Bank of Ghana’s Composite Index of Economic Activity (CIEA) expanding by 12.6% year-on-year in March 2026. This marks a sharp rise from the 2.3% growth recorded during the same period in 2025. According to the Bank’s latest real sector [...] The post Ghana’s economic activity strengthens, but business confidence eases to 12.6% – BoG appeared first on Ghanamma.com .

results.title: Melody diplomacy sweetens India’s toffee exports
NCLAT says NCLT cannot directly order SFIO Probe; refers matter to Centre
results.description: The National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) has held that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) could not directly order an investigation by the Serious Fraud Investigation Office (SFIO) and clarified that such power rests with the Central Government under the Companies Act.

results.title: Consumer discretionary churn: Why Ambit likes Titan, Trent over QSR, SMIDs
results.description: Ambit said crude-linked RM inflation is expected to impact companies unevenly, with margin outcomes depending on pricing strategy, balance sheet strength, and operating leverage

results.title: Indian Rupee bounces back due to RBI’s intervention, sharp correction in oil prices
results.description: The Indian Rupee (INR) extends its recovery against the US Dollar (USD) on Thursday after underperforming for almost two weeks.
